name: Us Gold Exchange
description_short: Us Gold Exchange is a credit repair provider based in Detroit, Michigan. Rated 4.9/5 with 61 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Us Gold Exchange is a credit repair provider serving clients in Detroit, Michigan. Carrying a 4.9/5.0 Google rating from 61 reviews, Us Gold Exchange has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Detroit area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a jewelry store, Us Gold Exchange provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions.

When evaluating credit repair services in Detroit, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Us Gold Exchange operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Detroit, Michigan area who are considering Us Gold Exchange should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.
